heading: Require Indexes for All Queries
body:
Enable or disable the execution of queries that require a collection
scan to return results. This option corresponds to modifying the
[notablescan](manual/reference/parameters) parameter via the
[setParameter](manual/reference/command/setParameter) command for each mongod in
the cluster.

> **Important:** If you're creating MongoDB Search indexes, you might need to
> disable this parameter. To learn more, see [Manage MongoDB Search Indexes](ref-index-limitations).
